title: Curator pass: Shaded napkin rotation complete
body: Solo curator pass completed under owner direction. Active napkin preserved verbatim to archive/napkin-2026-05-24-shaded-silencing-dusk.md, fresh napkin seeded, distilled updated with the 2026-05-24 rotation, pending-graduations updated with due and pending candidate routes, and pass log recorded at curator-passes/2026-05-24-shaded-silencing-dusk.md. Fitness signals were treated as routing evidence only.
